title: Bag of Tokens
hints: Sort the tokens first. Consider playing the cheapest token face-up to gain points, and the most expensive face-down to gain power.
Use a two-pointer approach on the sorted array. Pointers start at the minimum and maximum values, moving inward as tokens are used.
Always play the smallest available token face-up if you can. If not, play the largest token face-down to boost power, unless you have no points.
